name: Good Housekeeping Chicken Winner
recipeIngredient: 1 red chili or a small pinch of chili powder
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heatproof casserole, brown the chicken breasts in the olive oil; remove.
2. Cook the onions or leeks in the butter until golden.
3. Stir in the flour, chili, stock, beans, chicken, and sauce.
4. Bring to a boil.
5. Season.
6. Cook at 180°C for 45 minutes.
